products.name: Matte Liquid Lipstick
products.description: A long-wearing, high-pigment liquid lipstick that dries down to a smooth matte finish.

products.name: Hydrating Foundation
products.description: Medium-coverage, buildable foundation that delivers a natural, dewy glow all day.

products.name: Volumizing Mascara
products.description: An intense black mascara with a custom brush that lifts, lengthens, and volumizes lashes.

products.name: Radiant Powder Blush
products.description: A silky, lightweight powder blush that adds a healthy, natural flush of color to the cheeks.

products.name: Eyeshadow Palette
products.description: A 12-shade palette featuring versatile warm matte and shimmering metallic tones.

products.name: Translucent Setting Powder
products.description: A lightweight, micro-milled powder that locks in makeup and absorbs excess oil for a soft-focus finish.

products.name: Illuminating Highlighter
products.description: A buttery powder highlighter that catches the light to deliver a high-shine, multidimensional glow.

products.name: Liquid Gel Eyeliner
products.description: An ultra-black, waterproof liquid liner with a precise brush tip for creating perfect wing extensions.

products.name: Hydrating Lip Oil
products.description: A non-sticky, nutrient-rich oil treatment that combines high-shine gloss with intense lip conditioning.

products.name: Tinted Brow Wax
products.description: A flexible, long-hold gel wax that shapes, tints, and grooms brows into place all day long.
